title: 2PCS 38mm / 1.5inch Lockout Tagout Locks, Safety Padlock,Plastic Yellow
features: [Size] Locking body part: 45mm x 39.5mm / 1.7 x 1.5 inches. Height of locking shackle: 38 mm / 1.5 inches
[Two Keys] One for use, one for personal security. Each lock has a different key.
[Safety] A cylinder reserved for safety padlocks. The key holding function ensures that the padlock does not remain unlocked

[Features]:Top notch durability in all environments Non-conductive thermoplastic security lock Unibody, designed exclusively for lockout tagout applications and equipped with a premium cylinder reserved for safety padlocks

[Application] Widely used in various lamps, control cabinets, valve boxes, public outdoor boxes, instrument power supply boxes, technical pipelines, heat protection projects, waterproof and riot lamps, electric cabinets, duct boxes, furniture and environmental protection fans, tool boxes, etc.
